name: blue lotus
summary: Mechanism context: calming support, mood support, sleep support. Safety: Limited human safety data. Treat as a CNS-active botanical; avoid driving or combining with alcohol/sedatives.. Interactions tracked: Possible additive sedation with alcohol, benzodiazepines, sleep aids.
description: Mechanism context: calming support, mood support, sleep support. Safety: Limited human safety data. Treat as a CNS-active botanical; avoid driving or combining with alcohol/sedatives.. Interactions tracked: Possible additive sedation with alcohol, benzodiazepines, sleep aids.
safetyNotes: Limited human safety data. Treat as a CNS-active botanical; avoid driving or combining with alcohol/sedatives.
contraindications: active psychiatric instability without clinician review.
preparation: Flower is used as tea, tincture, smoking blend, or extract; ingestion route and concentration strongly affect risk.
